summary: Backend testing completed for 'Student of the Week' feature. All 20 tests passed. The feature allows admin to select up to 2 students per week with name and picture. Public endpoint works without auth, admin endpoints properly require admin authentication (m0m0077100@gmail.com).
critical_code_review_comments: Backend properly excludes MongoDB _id from responses (line 363 in server.py)
Admin email check is hardcoded as ADMIN_EMAIL constant (line 951 in server.py)
Order validation correctly rejects values other than 1 or 2 (line 339)
Deactivation of previous student with same order works correctly (lines 343-346)

test_credentials.test_users_created: Temporary test users created and cleaned up during testing

seed_data_creation: No permanent seed data created - all test data cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Student of the Week feature fully tested. Key endpoints: GET /api/public/students-of-week (public), GET/POST/DELETE /api/admin/students-of-week (admin only). Admin is identified by email m0m0077100@gmail.com. Max 2 students can be active at a time. Adding a student with same order deactivates the previous one.

admin_endpoints_require_auth.details: All admin endpoints return 401 without authentication

non_admin_gets_403.details: Non-admin users get 403 Forbidden on admin endpoints

admin_crud_operations.details: Admin can GET, POST, DELETE students of week

max_2_students_limit.details: Maximum 2 students can be active at a time

order_validation.details: Order must be 1 or 2, invalid values rejected with 400

same_order_replacement.details: Adding student with same order deactivates previous student

data_validation.details: student_name and student_picture are required, order defaults to 1
